common.offline_description: We paused the site so actions and cards are not lost. Check your connection and refresh the page when the network is back.
common.connection_restored_reload_description: The connection is back, but the current page state may already be inconsistent. Refresh the page to continue.

auth.auth_provider_warning: Make sure you are using the component within `AuthProvider`.
auth.sign_in_description: Sign in with your email and password
auth.enter_details: Enter your details to get started
auth.password_hint: Must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.tos_agreement_auth: By clicking continue, you agree to our
auth.demo_accounts_description: Pick an account below to quickly open the needed scenario.
auth.tid_mock_description: Mock sign-in that immediately opens the first demo dataset account.
auth.demo_account_admin_description: Fast access to the admin dashboard.

profile.bank_profile_hint: This field comes from the banking profile and cannot be edited here.
profile.load_error: Failed to load profile. Please try refreshing the page.
profile.blocked_description: You can unblock users you previously blocked in chat or feed.
profile.goal_title: What are you looking for now
profile.audience_title: Who would you like to see first
profile.age_range_description: Keep the default range or fine-tune it manually.
profile.interests_description: These tags help us find people who fit your rhythm more precisely.
profile.ml_recommendations_description: We use aggregated banking transactions to better understand your rhythm of life. Consent is enabled by default.
profile.preview_description: This is not the feed yet. First review how your card will look, add a photo, and then continue to discovery.
profile.preview_card_label: This is how others will see you
profile.preview_bio_hint: This text is visible on your card. You can edit it here and later in the profile.
profile.preview_photo_ready: Your photo is already set. You can like others and appear in their feed.
profile.preview_photo_optional: A photo is optional for browsing, but without it you cannot like and your card will not be shown to other people.
profile.preview_photo_required: To open discovery, you need a photo. Upload your own or use the demo photo.
profile.preview_next_description: Your card is ready. The next action opens discovery right away.
profile.preview_next_locked_description: Add a photo to the card first. As soon as you do, the button below will open discovery.
profile.preview_ready_status: Your card is ready. You can move on to discovery.
profile.preview_need_photo_status: A photo is still required. Without it you cannot enter discovery.
profile.preview_continue_without_photo: You can continue without a photo and add one later in a single tap.

onboarding.description: We analyze your habits and rhythm of life to find people you're truly on the same path with.
onboarding.smart_matching_description: Recommendations based on aggregated data about leisure, favorite places, and spending.
onboarding.privacy_description: No sensitive data. Only common interests and behavior patterns.
onboarding.tos_agreement: By clicking the button, you agree to the data processing rules.

discovery.analyzing_habits: We are analyzing new data about your lifestyle to find perfect matches.
discovery.safety_description: We make sure communication is comfortable. Choose an action for this profile.
discovery.test_match_ready: Test match is armed. Swipe right to create a mutual match.
discovery.like_failed: Failed to send like. Please try again.
discovery.compatibility_interests_fallback: There is a noticeable overlap in interests and leisure habits.
discovery.compatibility_location_summary: It will be convenient to meet in {{location}}
discovery.compatibility_location_fallback: Location and distance are a good fit.
discovery.compatibility_lifestyle_fallback: Your rhythm of life and habits fit well together.
discovery.photo_gate_title: Add a photo before sending a like
discovery.photo_gate_description: Profiles with photos get far more responses. Add a photo to continue dating and send this like.
discovery.demo_panel_open_card: Open this card for the jury flow
discovery.demo_panel_reset_success: This demo pair is ready for a fresh match again.
discovery.demo_panel_reset_error: Failed to reset this demo pair.

match.match_description: You and {{name}} liked each other. It's time to start chatting.
match.realtime_match_hint: You have a fresh match and can start the conversation right away.
match.empty_description: When a match happens, it will appear here. For now, you can go back to discovery.

chat.no_active_chats_description: When a match happens, the conversation will appear here. For now, you can go back to discovery.

errors.failed_to_get_explanation: Failed to get compatibility explanation for this card.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Likes, matches, and messages in one place.
notifications.empty_body: When someone likes you, matches with you, or sends a message, it will appear here.
notifications.empty_subtitle: Your activity inbox will appear here.

dashboard.title: Operations and moderation control room
dashboard.subtitle: This page combines product metrics, match quality, and the moderation workflow: user reports, review actions, and bans.
dashboard.overview_error_description: One or more admin endpoints did not respond. Check the backend and refresh the page.
dashboard.registrations_description: Shows how new user inflow changes over time.
dashboard.funnel_description: A quick operational snapshot of feed delivery, likes, matches, messages, and safety events.
dashboard.daily_outcomes_description: Matches, first messages, and reports over time.
dashboard.conversions_description: Shows the quality of transitions between funnel steps.

reviews.title: Report review queue
reviews.subtitle: Reports from feed and chat land here. Admins can inspect context, leave a note, dismiss the report, or ban the target user.
reviews.flow_description: Helpful for the team and for the jury: you can see how a report appears and what the moderator actually does next.

flow.reported_description: The report is created from feed or chat via the safety flow and immediately enters the pending queue.
flow.review_description: The queue shows reporter, target, category, context, description, and whether the user also blocked the target.
flow.action_description: The admin can dismiss, resolve without a ban, or resolve and ban. The decision is stored in the report and reflected in the user list.

reviews.error_title: Failed to load the report queue
reviews.error_description: Backend moderation endpoints did not respond. Check the server and refresh the page.
reviews.empty_description: There are no reports in the selected status right now. As soon as someone sends a report, it will appear here.
reviews.no_description: The reporter did not provide a text description.
reviews.also_block: The report was submitted together with a user block
reviews.note_placeholder: Add a short note with the final decision or context for the team.
reviews.review_error: Failed to save the review decision

admin.dashboard_description: This page combines product funnel signals, match quality, dataset vs cold-start differences, and model vs fallback delivery in one place.
admin.moderation_description: This section will hold report queues, bans, and moderator actions.
admin.moderation_placeholder: Left intentionally empty for now. Next iteration can plug reports, blocks, and manual review queues into this section.
admin.activity_timeline_description: Daily registrations compared with real feed delivery volume.
admin.quality_snapshot_description: A quick view of how recommendations progress into conversation and where friction starts.
admin.daily_funnel_description: Matches, first messages, replies, and safety events by day.
admin.by_source_description: Compare dataset and cold-start funnel behavior.
admin.by_decision_mode_description: See how model and fallback paths behave side by side.
admin.segment_matrix_description: Intersection of user source and decision mode for quick quality checks.
admin.notes_title: What to call out in the demo
admin.notes_description: Short prompts for discussing product hypotheses and the model.
admin.insight_model_text: If fallback starts dominating, it becomes visible immediately in the decision-mode slice and in weaker downstream funnel steps.
admin.insight_dataset_text: Dataset users provide a richer start, while cold-start users show how effective the base onboarding path is.
admin.insight_funnel_text: The key case metric is not just matches, but the transition to first message, reply, and low safety friction.
admin.random_mix_description: Share of random candidate injection in ranking for model quality stress testing.
admin.random_mix_not_set: Setting has not been applied yet
admin.partial_data_description: A few widgets did not receive API data. The rest of the dashboard is still up to date.

moderation_page.title: User Moderation
moderation_page.subtitle: Review and manage user accounts efficiently.
moderation_page.error_description: We encountered a problem fetching the user list. Please check your connection and try again.
moderation_page.no_users_matching: There are no users matching your current filter criteria.
